name: autoship
description: CLI tool for automated changeset-based releases with AI-generated descriptions.
intent_triggers: 我需要處理 autoship 相關工作
幫我啟用 autoship 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 autoship

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the autoship skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
